name: Consumers
description_short: Consumers Credit Union is a Michigan and Northern Indiana-based credit union offering checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards with digital banking access.
description_long: Consumers Credit Union has been serving Michigan and Northern Indiana for 75 years, operating as a member-owned financial cooperative rather than a for-profit bank. The organization positions itself as a community-focused institution with emphasis on local partnerships and member support. They offer a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, CDs, mortgages, auto loans, credit cards, home equity lines of credit, and business banking services. The credit union operates multiple physical locations and provides online banking capabilities with routing number 272481839. Consumers Credit Union differentiates itself through community engagement programs, including partnerships with charity groups, a "Round Up for Impact" donation initiative, and the Wimee Kids' Savings Club for children ages 12 and under. They also provide financial education through blogs, podcasts, and videos covering topics like secured/unsecured loans, health insurance shopping, and estate planning. The organization emphasizes personal financial coaching through their "Consumers Coach" program and member perks offering exclusive discounts from partner merchants. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, membership eligibility may be restricted to specific geographic areas or employment groups, though the website does not explicitly state membership requirements. Their current promotional offerings include a 4.99% APR introductory HELOC rate for 12 months and 4.00% APY on checking accounts that meet certain debit and credit card purchase requirements. The organization is actively recruiting employees and marketing itself as one of Michigan's fastest-growing companies.
services: Checking accounts (including Serious Interest Checking with purchase-based rewards)
Savings accounts and money market accounts
Business banking and commercial real estate loans
pros: Offers competitive promotional rates including 4.99% APR HELOC for 12 months and 4.00% APY checking
Comprehensive product suite including mortgages, auto loans, credit cards, HELOCs, and business banking in one institution
Provides free financial education through multiple formats: blogs, podcasts, and videos on relevant topics
Member perks program with exclusive discounts and partnerships with local merchants
Dedicated financial coaching service (Consumers Coach) for personalized guidance at life stages
Strong community focus with charity partnerships and Round Up for Impact giving program
Kids savings club (Wimee) introducing financial literacy to younger members
Online banking system available for account management and transactions
cons: Geographic limitation to Michigan and Northern Indiana may restrict membership eligibility
Membership requirements not clearly disclosed on website, may have income or employment restrictions typical of credit unions
Limited information on competitive rates across all product categories; only select promotional rates highlighted
No mention of mobile app features or mobile-specific banking capabilities on homepage
Website does not provide loan approval timelines, APR ranges, or specific product terms for comparison
best_for: Michigan and Northern Indiana residents seeking relationship banking with local community focus
Members looking for competitive mortgage and home equity products with promotional rates
Families wanting to introduce children to saving with a dedicated kids' club program
diagnosis: Consumers Credit Union is best suited for Michigan and Northern Indiana residents seeking a full-service credit union with competitive rates, community involvement, and personalized financial coaching. Primary caveat is geographic membership limitation and lack of transparency around membership eligibility criteria on their public website.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Consumers — Credit Union in Brooklyn, NY | CreditDoc
meta_description: Consumers — NCUA-insured credit union in Brooklyn, NY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
